testcase.name: verifyLeadingTrailingSpacesAreTrimmed

failure.message: The following asserts failed: First Name is not trimmed! expected [John] but found [ John ], Last Name is not trimmed! expected [Joe] but found [ Joe ], Telephone is not trimmed! expected [0123456789] but found [ 0123456789 ]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: First Name is not trimmed! expected [John] but found [ John ], Last Name is not trimmed! expected [Joe] but found [ Joe ], Telephone is not trimmed! expected [0123456789] but found [ 0123456789 ] at registertests.RegisterTrimSpacesTest.verifyLeadingTrailingSpacesAreTrimmed(RegisterTrimSpacesTest.java:44) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 31 stack frames
